sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 4.3g of fat. saturated fat, cholesterol, and polyunsaturated fat are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
sections.subtitleText: 4.3g of fat. saturated fat, cholesterol, and polyunsaturated fat are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 3.4g of carbs. sugar and glycemic index matter most here. for dairy, the best versions keep the convenience without wrecking the fat profile.
sections.subtitleText: 3.4g of carbs. sugar and glycemic index matter most here. for dairy, the best versions keep the convenience without wrecking the fat profile.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 11.1g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.
sections.subtitleText: 11.1g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 13% daily value stands out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 13% daily value stands out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: minerals are basically not part of the case here.
sections.subtitleText: minerals are basically not part of the case here.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: lean high-protein dairy. tests whether greek yogurt is the only clean dairy S. very filling. strong practical upside. fairly simple food. strong dairy identity without dessert drift.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next: can be fairly salty. practical downside. texture is divisive. not universally liked. not suitable for everyone. tolerance varies.

closing.summary: Cottage Cheese has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
